content.problemStatement:
Go through the code in your editor slowly to see what’s causing the problem and fix it.

For a given integer, we need to print an integer twice the input. 

Check the sample input / output below for further clarity.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each of the next T lines contains a single integer N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the value 2 × N.

solution.approach: The problem asks for doubling each given integer. For every test case we read N and compute N*2. This direct arithmetic operation is O(1) per test case, leading to O(T) total time. No extra data structures are needed, so the memory usage is O(1) besides the output buffer.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T) total, O(1) per test case.
